    A

    add(User, Transaction) - Method in class service.TransactionService
    Adds a transaction and updates the user's balance.
    addBalance(double) - Method in class model.User
    Adds an amount to the user's balance.
    addExpense(double) - Method in class model.Budget
    Adds an expense to the budget.
    addExpense(String, double) - Method in class repository.BudgetRepository
    Saves an added expense to a budget category.
    addSaving(double) - Method in class model.Goal
    Adds an amount to the current saved amount.
    addSaving(String, double) - Method in class repository.GoalRepository
    Add an amount to a specific goal
    addSaving(String, double) - Method in class service.GoalService
    Adds a saving amount to a specific goal.
    AuthService - Class in service
    Service class responsible for user authentication operations
    AuthService() - Constructor for class service.AuthService
     

    B

    Budget - Class in model
    This class represents a budget for a specific category.
    Budget(String, double) - Constructor for class model.Budget
    Constructs a Budget with zero initial spending.
    Budget(String, double, double) - Constructor for class model.Budget
    Constructs a Budget with a category, limit amount, and initial spent value.
    BudgetRepository - Class in repository
    This class responsible for managing budget data.
    BudgetRepository() - Constructor for class repository.BudgetRepository
     
    BudgetService - Class in service
    Service class responsible for budget operations
    BudgetService() - Constructor for class service.BudgetService
     

    C

    createBudget(String, double) - Method in class service.BudgetService
    Creates a new budget after validating the input data.
    createGoal(String, double) - Method in class service.GoalService
    Creates a new goal after validating the input data.

    E

    EXPENSE - Enum constant in enum class model.Transaction.Type
     

    F

    find(String) - Method in class repository.UserRepository
    Finds a user by email.
    findByCategory(String) - Method in class repository.BudgetRepository
    Finds a budget by its category
    fromFileLine(String) - Static method in class model.Budget
    Creates a Budget object from a file line.
    fromFileLine(String) - Static method in class model.Goal
    Creates a Goal object from a formatted file line.
    fromFileLine(String) - Static method in class model.Transaction
    Creates a Transaction object from a Comma-Separated Values line.
    fromFileLine(String) - Static method in class model.User
    Creates a User object from a CSV line.

    G

    generate(List) - Method in class service.ReportService
    Generates a financial report based on a list of transactions.
    getAll() - Method in class repository.BudgetRepository
    Retrieves all budgets from the file.
    getAll() - Method in class repository.GoalRepository
    Retrieve all goals from the file
    getAll() - Method in class repository.TransactionRepository
    Retrieves all transaction from the file
    getAll() - Method in class service.TransactionService
    Retrieves all stored transactions.
    getAllBudgets() - Method in class service.BudgetService
    Retrieves all stored budgets.
    getAllGoals() - Method in class service.GoalService
    Retrieves all stored goals.
    getAmount() - Method in class model.Transaction
    Returns the amount of this transaction.
    getBalance() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's current balance.
    getCategory() - Method in class model.Budget
    Returns the budget category.
    getCategory() - Method in class model.Transaction
    Returns the category of this transaction.
    getCurrent() - Method in class model.Goal
    Returns the current saved amount.
    getEmail() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's email.
    getLimitAmount() - Method in class model.Budget
    Returns the spending limit
    getName() - Method in class model.Goal
    Returns the goal name.
    getName() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's name.
    getPassword() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the user's password.
    getProgress() - Method in class model.Goal
    Calculates the progress percentage towards the goal.
    getRemaining() - Method in class model.Budget
    Calculates the remaining budget.
    getSpent() - Method in class model.Budget
    Returns the amount spent so far
    getStatus() - Method in class model.Budget
    Returns the current status of the budget.
    getStatus() - Method in class model.Goal
    Returns the current status of the goal.
    getTarget() - Method in class model.Goal
    Returns the target amount to be achieved.
    getType() - Method in class model.Transaction
    Returns the type of this transaction.
    Goal - Class in model
    This class represents a financial goal to be achieved.
    Goal(String, double) - Constructor for class model.Goal
    Constructs a Goal with zero initial saved amount.
    Goal(String, double, double) - Constructor for class model.Goal
    Constructs a Goal with a name, target amount, and current saved amount.
    GoalRepository - Class in repository
    Repository class for Goal entities.
    GoalRepository() - Constructor for class repository.GoalRepository
     
    GoalService - Class in service
    Service class responsible for goal operations and business logic
    GoalService() - Constructor for class service.GoalService

    INCOME - Enum constant in enum class model.Transaction.Type
     

    L

    login(String, String) - Method in class service.AuthService
    Authenticates a user using email and password.

    M

    MainFrame - Class in ui
    Main graphical user interface for the Personal Budgeting Software.
    MainFrame() - Constructor for class ui.MainFrame
    Creates and initializes the main application window.

    R

    ReportService - Class in service
    Service class responsible for generating financial reports.
    ReportService() - Constructor for class service.ReportService
     
    repository - package repository
     

    S

    save(Budget) - Method in class repository.BudgetRepository
    Saves a budget or updates it if it already exists.
    save(Goal) - Method in class repository.GoalRepository
    Saves a goal or updates it if it already exists.
    save(Transaction) - Method in class repository.TransactionRepository
    Save a specific transaction and stores it to the file
    save(User) - Method in class repository.UserRepository
    Saves a user if the email not already registered
    service - package service
     
    signUp(String, String, String) - Method in class service.AuthService
    register a new user after validating the input data
    subtractBalance(double) - Method in class model.User
    Subtracts an amount from the user's balance.

    T

    toFileLine() - Method in class model.Budget
    Converts the budget object to a string format for file storage.
    toFileLine() - Method in class model.Goal
    Converts the goal data into a string format for file storage.
    toFileLine() - Method in class model.Transaction
    Converts this transaction into a Comma-Separated Values line for file storage.
    toFileLine() - Method in class model.User
    Converts this user to a CSV line for file storage.
    trackExpense(String, double) - Method in class service.BudgetService
    Adds an expense to a budget and returns its current status.
    Transaction - Class in model
    Represents a financial transaction in the system.
    Transaction(Transaction.Type, double, String) - Constructor for class model.Transaction
    Constructs a new Transaction with the specified type, amount, and category.
    Transaction.Type - Enum Class in model
     
    TransactionRepository - Class in repository
    Repository class for Transaction entities.
    TransactionRepository() - Constructor for class repository.TransactionRepository
     
    TransactionService - Class in service
    Service class responsible for transactions operations and business logic
    TransactionService() - Constructor for class service.TransactionService
     

    U

    ui - package ui
     
    User - Class in model
    This class represents a user with name, email, password, and balance.
    User(String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.User
    Constructs a user with zero initial account balance.
    User(String, String, String, double) - Constructor for class model.User
    Constructs a user with a specified initial balance.
    UserRepository - Class in repository
    Repository class for User entities.
    UserRepository() - Constructor for class repository.UserRepository
     

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class model.Transaction.Type
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class model.Transaction.Type
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
